title: Matthew Stover

{{Quote|When I write a book, I put everything I have into it; so the more I have, the more the books become. Some people get freaked out by them: mostly the people who believe, mistakenly, that fantasy is about escaping reality. To them I say: If you have a problem with reality, you should be spending more time dealing with your life, and less time reading popcorn fantasy.|Matthew Stover|<ref name="Interview">{{WebCite|url=http://theforce.net/jedicouncil/interview/mattstover.asp|text=Interview with Matthew Stover - Traitor Author|author=Michael Potts|date=2002-08-07|archivedate=20230711164316}}</ref>}}
'''Matthew Woodring Stover''' is an author of several ''[[Star Wars]]'' novels, including ''[[The New Jedi Order: Traitor]]'', [[Shatterpoint (novel)|''Shatterpoint'']], the [[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith (novelization)|''Revenge of the Sith'' novelization]], and ''[[Luke Skywalker and the Shadows of Mindor]]'', as well as the short stories "[[Equipment (short story)|Equipment]]" and "[[The Tenebrous Way]]."
